steps.title: Specify the improvement
steps.content: The first sentence says Carter improved Wallace's light bulb design. The next sentence gives the exact way he improved it: placing cardboard around the carbon filament.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: A suggests time sequence, B suggests concession despite an obstacle, and C suggests contrast. The relationship is specification, because the second sentence supplies a precise detail about the improvement. The answer is D.
